_doc: Tier 1 personal invites for Pedal for Empathy (Sat May 2, 2026). Edit emails + flip `send: true` when ready. Run `node send.mjs --dry-run` first; then live without the flag. Sent records land in sent-log.json.

_event.name: Pedal for Empathy
_event.start: Hanson-Larsen Memorial Park (coffee + donuts before ride out)

recipients.name: Melissa Petersen
recipients.personal_line: Thanks again for handling the waiver coordination — we're locked in on our end. Drop the trash question if you'd rather just chat Saturday morning.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Pull email from Mar 31 / Apr 1 thread. She's already a partner — this is a courtesy 'see you Saturday' rather than a recruit.

recipients.name: Laura (Minneluzahan Senior Center)
recipients.personal_line: Hope the newsletter blast went out — appreciate you including us. Would love to see anyone from Minneluzahan come ride or just hang at the start. We'll have coffee and donuts at Hanson-Larsen.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Pull email from Apr 13 newsletter thread. Already engaged — this is a 'come on Saturday' nudge.

recipients.name: Marinell Simpson (Nell's Gourmet)
recipients.personal_line: Just confirming we're all set on the coffee for Saturday morning at Hanson-Larsen. I'll swing by Friday afternoon for the airpots if that still works — let me know what time is best. Thanks again for partnering on this.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Pull email from Apr 16 coffee thread. Confirming logistics, not first invite.

recipients.name: Acme Bikes (owner / manager)
recipients.personal_line: We're co-hosting Saturday and would love to have your full team out — staff in shop t-shirts, customers welcome. Anything you need from us between now and then, say the word. I'll be by Friday with last-minute logistics.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Tim Rangitsch / Acme Bikes — already partner. This is the 'rally your staff' nudge. Tim's email per memory acme-bikes-tim.md. Or do this in-person Friday; flip send=false if going in person.

recipients.name: Greg Stone
recipients.personal_line: Saturday May 2, 10:30 at Hanson-Larsen. Coffee and donuts, easy ride, family-friendly. Would love to have you out there. No pressure — but it'd mean a lot.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Channel is text/call per invite list. Email is a backup only — recommend texting (see text-scripts.md). If sending, use your dad's email.

recipients.name: Mato & Tracy (Strong Bear Media)
recipients.personal_line: First grant-funded SBC event — community ride + bike-path cleanup, Saturday May 2 at 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen. Family-friendly. Would love to have y'all there even if just for coffee at the start. Spread the word too if it lands right with anyone in your circle.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Channel is text per invite list. Use text-scripts.md instead unless they're easier to reach by email.

recipients.name: Sheely (Horsepower Ranch)
recipients.personal_line: Long shot since you're outside the city, but Saturday May 2 at 10:30 we're doing a free community ride + cleanup from Hanson-Larsen. Would be great to see you. Bring the kids if it works.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Text channel preferred per invite list.

recipients.name: ATK Landscaping (contact)
recipients.personal_line: Saturday May 2 at 10:30 — community ride + bike-path cleanup. Trades-and-outdoors angle felt like your kind of thing. Family-friendly, free, starts at Hanson-Larsen. Bring the team if you want.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Pull contact from Trad Diff/Clients/ATKLandscaping/. Could go email or text.

recipients.name: SlipKnits owner
recipients.personal_line: Doing a free downtown-adjacent community ride + bike-path cleanup Saturday May 2 at 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen — would love to drop a flyer at the shop and have you come if it fits.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Better as in-person drop-by Thursday/Friday (see dropby-checklist.md). Email only as fallback.

recipients.name: Prairie Edge
recipients.personal_line: Saturday May 2 — Pedal for Empathy, community ride + bike-path cleanup, 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen. Would love to leave a flyer on your community board and have folks know about it.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Better as in-person drop-by (see dropby-checklist.md). Email is fallback.

recipients.name: Firehouse Brewing
recipients.personal_line: Wanted you on the radar for our community event Saturday May 2 — bike ride + bike-path cleanup, family-friendly, free. Starts 10:30 at Hanson-Larsen. Will leave a flyer if y'all have a community board.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Better as in-person drop-by. Email is fallback.

recipients.name: Chris (Inner Earth Breathwork)
recipients.personal_line: Saturday May 2, 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen — free community ride + bike-path cleanup. Wellness, movement, community — felt like your crowd would love it. Come if it fits, and feel free to share with anyone.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Per invite list, Nicole texts him. Probably skip email — see text-scripts.md.

recipients.name: Ignite RC contacts
recipients.personal_line: Hackathon was a great time. Quick share — we're hosting a free community ride + bike-path cleanup this Saturday May 2 at 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen. Funded by an empathy grant we won out of 600 applicants. Family-friendly. Come if it fits, and feel free to forward.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Per invite list TBD after Apr 24-26 hackathon. Pick the 1-3 most relevant Ignite contacts to add as separate entries with their emails.

recipients.name: Karen Jelsma
recipients.personal_line: Saturday May 2, 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen — community ride + bike-path cleanup. Wellness + community + outdoors. Would love to see you there.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Nicole's invite. Channel is text per invite list — see text-scripts.md.

recipients.name: Dakota Doulas
recipients.personal_line: Wanted to share — Stone Bicycle Coalition is hosting a free, family-friendly community ride + cleanup on Saturday May 2 at 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen. Strollers and slow rollers welcome. Would love to have your group on the radar.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Nicole's invite. Pull email from her wellness inquiry thread.

recipients.name: Dharma CE attendees
recipients.personal_line: Pedal for Empathy — Saturday May 2 at 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen. Free community ride + bike-path cleanup, family-friendly. Body-movement and community-connection angle felt right for this group. Come ride or just hang at the start.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Nicole's invite. Bulk-able list — pull from Dharma CE roster. Consider sending as one bcc'd batch by adding multiple entries (one per attendee) with same body.

recipients.name: Nicole's active/outdoorsy contacts (NOT clients)
recipients.personal_line: Saturday May 2 at 10:30 from Hanson-Larsen — free community ride + bike-path cleanup. Family-friendly. Would love to see you out there.
recipients.notes_for_rory: Per invite list these are colleagues/contacts, not therapy clients. Nicole picks who. Better as text — see text-scripts.md.
